insights.title: Broad-based cost relief
insights.text: 11 of 15 tracked materials are on a week-on-week price alert, with an average WoW change of -5.1% across the portfolio, improving near-term procurement timing.

insights.title: Corn Gluten Feed leads the drop
insights.text: Corn Gluten Feed fell 47.5% week-on-week to $219/MT, the sharpest decline in the portfolio, while Calcium Phosphate rose 38.6% WoW on tightening supply.

insights.title: Amino acid sourcing concentration risk
insights.text: L-Lysine, L-Threonine, PH Raw Materials and Amino Acid (Feed) are all sourced primarily from China; Akij pays a premium versus India-origin alternatives on L-Lysine (+77.6% vs. best buy).

insights.title: Limestone and Calcium Phosphate flagged high cost
insights.text: Both materials carry a HIGH COST signal versus alternative origins (Vietnam and Morocco respectively), representing the clearest near-term diversification opportunities.

insights.title: Wheat Bran is the standout Strong Buy
insights.text: Wheat Bran is the only Strong Buy signal in the portfolio, sourced optimally from Nigeria at $192/MT versus a portfolio average of $849/MT.
